Package org.apache.bookkeeper.proto

Class ReadLastConfirmedAndEntryContext

java.lang.Object
org.apache.bookkeeper.proto.ReadLastConfirmedAndEntryContext
All Implemented Interfaces:
BookkeeperInternalCallbacks.ReadEntryCallbackCtx
public class ReadLastConfirmedAndEntryContext extends Object implements BookkeeperInternalCallbacks.ReadEntryCallbackCtx
A BookkeeperInternalCallbacks.ReadEntryCallbackCtx for long poll read requests.
